comment: All agents configured to use GitHub Copilot models only - Updated Mar 2026

sisyphus.description: Main orchestrator agent - uses Claude Opus 4.6 for maximum reasoning

librarian.description: Documentation and codebase research - uses Claude Sonnet 4.6

explore.description: Fast codebase exploration - uses Grok Code (unchanged, still fastest)

oracle.description: Architecture and strategy - uses GPT-5.4 for deep analysis

document-writer.description: Technical writing - uses Gemini 3 Flash (unchanged, good speed/quality)

multimodal-looker.description: Visual content analysis - uses Gemini 3.1 Pro for better multimodal
